title: cenchrus elatus
intro: Cenchrus elatus, also known as the Chinese millet or Chinese foxtail grass, is a type of plant native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cenchrus elatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Cenchrus elatus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
